# Regular documentation file — TC-BAT-NEG (F-CR-963-2 filter test)
# This file simulates a changed PR file that is NOT a Codex worker spawn prompt.
# It contains no ADR-081 D1.A-D field anchors.
# The workflow content pre-screen should NOT select this file for lint.

## Purpose

This fixture verifies the blast-surface reduction in the workflow:
files without Codex spawn prompt field patterns are excluded from lint scope.

## Regular content

This document describes a general configuration approach.
The system uses standard authentication via token rotation every 90 days.
Integration with the CI pipeline runs on pull request events.
Artifact retention is set to 30 days for non-production builds.
The deployment target is ubuntu-latest runners.
Label management follows the established taxonomy.
Version bumps must be atomic across the three relevant files.
